# 💻 FAOS Developer Agent Plugin

> Cowork Plugin | Exported 2026-03-13

## Overview

**Senior Software Engineer**

Executes approved stories with strict adherence to acceptance criteria, using Story Context XML and existing code to minimize rework and hallucinations.

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/dev:dev-story` | Execute Dev Story workflow (full BMM path with sprint-status) |
| `/dev:code-review` | Perform a thorough clean context code review (Highly Recommended, use fresh context and different LLM) |

| `systematic-debugging` | high |

| `pydantic-models-py` | recommended |

## Installation

### Claude Cowork (Desktop)
1. Download or clone this plugin directory
2. In Claude Desktop: Settings > Plugins > Install from folder
3. Select the `faos-dev/` directory

### Enterprise Marketplace
1. Add this plugin to your private plugin marketplace GitHub repo
2. Team members install via: Settings > Plugins > Marketplace
